name: Client Operating Model Phase 2 Object Truth Ingestion
outcome_goal: Produce the Object Truth ingestion and evidence capture implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not store raw client payloads without explicit privacy and retention policy.
Do not bypass CQRS gateway operations.

jobs.label: phase_02_object_truth_ingestion_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_02_object_truth_ingestion/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 2: Object Truth Ingestion and Evidence Capture. Cover schema capture, sample capture, source metadata, redacted previews, raw/normalized hashes, object versions, field observations, receipts, events, fixture data, tests, and validation. Call out exactly what exists today and what must be built. Do not edit code.
